data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Email confirmations', which is explicitly stated in the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms the sending of email confirmations after bookings are made. The prior steps indicate successful bookings, but they do not include any information regarding email notifications, leading to a clear gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of email confirmations being sent after bookings.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
